REVORY Workspace

Revenue recovery workspace

MedSpa-first
MODE_B
Activated
ACTIVE

OPERATIONS OVERVIEW

Your workspace has a real operational base.

REVORY is already holding the imported foundation for appointment monitoring. Confirmation, recovery, and review metrics unlock next from this base.

Mar 2026
Open imports

MONITORED REVENUE BASE

$670.00

Current revenue already attached to imported appointments.

APPOINTMENTS MONITORED

4

Appointments already persisted in this workspace.

UPCOMING APPOINTMENTS

2

Scheduled ahead of the current server time.

CLIENT PROFILES

7

Current stored client base available to REVORY.

CANCELLED APPOINTMENTS

1

Imported rows already marked as canceled.

North-star metrics

These are the outcomes REVORY is designed to surface as the live flow layer comes online.

Confirmation Rate

Next layer

Starts once confirmation logic is running on top of imported appointments.

Estimated Revenue Protected

Next layer

Appears when no-show prevention begins protecting booked revenue.

Estimated Revenue Recovered

Next layer

Appears when rebooking and empty-slot recovery are active.

Google Reviews Requested

Next layer

Appears when the review request layer begins using the saved Google link.

Import readiness

Data quality stays visible so the customer always knows what landed and what still needs cleanup.

Mode and flow roadmap

The workspace already has a clear operating direction, even before all live automations are on.

Mode B · Attendance Recovery

Confirmation Flow

Included in every starting mode once the live automation layer turns on.

Reminder Flow

Included in every starting mode for pre-appointment follow-up.

Rebooking / Empty Slot Recovery

Included in this mode once recovery logic is live.

Review Request Flow

Unlocks in the review-focused mode.

Upcoming appointments

The next scheduled appointments already visible in the current workspace base.

2 upcoming
AC

Ana Costa

Laser Facial · Dec 15, 11:00 AM

SCHEDULED
DA

Diego Alves

Hydra Facial · Dec 20, 12:00 PM

SCHEDULED

Workspace readiness

A premium SaaS should make the next action obvious. This block keeps the workspace status readable at a glance.

Workspace activated

Core setup is complete and the private workspace is live.

Data imported

Bring in appointments or clients so REVORY has an operational base to monitor.
